report.summary: Community cycle v3 (late): Consolidated day's community output — 6 tweets drafted (#211-216), 2 newsletters (v34 weekly digest + v35 whale watch), 2 SVG social cards, Discord/TG recap. Highest-growth content: Fear & Greed Timeline and DCA Calculator at peak relevance during 49-day Extreme Fear streak (F&G 12). 20+ new guides published this week. Bear market investing, whale accumulation, and ETF ruling content identified as top social drivers.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #211 — Bear Market Investing Hook: F&G at 12, longest Extreme Fear streak since post-FTX 2022, historical +38% median BTC return from sub-15 readings. CTA → bear-market-investing-guide.
Tweet #212 — DePIN Ecosystem Thread (5 parts): Real-world revenue crypto sector, Helium/Hivemapper/Render examples, institutional interest angle. CTA → depin-ecosystem-guide.
Tweet #213 — Weekly Recap: 20+ new guides published (bear market, smart money, ETF, DePIN, Solana LST, RWA yield, StarkNet, TON/SUI). 556 pages live, all free.
Tweet #214 — Whale Accumulation Signal: 270K BTC in 30 days (largest since 2013), 20K+ whale wallets at record, $458M ETF inflow day. CTA → whale-tracker.
Tweet #215 — Mystery ETH Whale Thread (5 parts): $253M ETH accumulated since Mar 1, ETH/BTC at 0.0301, Goldman $108M SOL ETF, SEC classifications. CTA → whale-tracker + crypto-etfs-guide.
Tweet #216 — Weekend Data Drop: F&G 12 (day 49), whale wallets record, historical sub-15 returns +38.4% median 90d, FTX zone parallel ($16K→$42K = +162%). CTA → fear-greed-timeline.

Newsletter v34: Weekly Digest — Subject: 'The Extreme Fear Playbook'. Market pulse (BTC $66K, ETH sub-$2K), 20+ new guides, featured reads (bear market investing, smart money signals, DePIN), SEC ETF ruling coverage.
Newsletter v35: Weekend Whale Watch — 270K BTC whale accumulation during 49-day fear streak, $253M ETH whale, ETF flow reversal, 577 published pages, historical +38.4% stat.
Discord/TG: Saturday Evening Recap — BTC $66,348, ETH $1,997, SOL $83, F&G 12 (day 49). Smart money signals: 270K BTC whale accumulation, $458M ETF inflow reversal, $253M mystery ETH whale.

sections.title: Recommendations
items: CRITICAL: Deploy must happen before social posts go live — all new page links will 404 until 271 uncommitted files are committed and pushed to Vercel.
Prioritize bear market + fear-driven content promotion: DCA Calculator, Fear & Greed Timeline, Bear Market Investing Guide are at peak search relevance.
ETF content has a 24-48 hour window of peak search intent from the Mar 27 SEC ruling — publish and promote immediately upon deploy.
DePIN thread should be scheduled for weekday (Mon/Tue) for maximum engagement — educational threads perform better on workdays.
Consider creating a dedicated landing page for 'crypto fear and greed index 2026' to capture the sustained search interest during this 49-day streak.

notes: No Google Search Console or Vercel Analytics data accessible from this environment — performance analysis based on content recency, market timing, search intent signals, and publishing history.
Social posts are draft-only — no external posting tools connected. Manual posting required.
Deploy blocker (271 uncommitted files) is the single biggest constraint on community growth — all new content is invisible to Google until committed and pushed.
